recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: Valentin
recommendations.overview: Valentin, an 8-year-old boy living with his grandmother in late-1960s Buenos Aires, is surrounded by problems in his family he finds only himself capable of solving.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: An early-20th-century tale of love across class boundaries which tells the legendary and romantic story of Lady Chatterley’s affair with her gamekeeper. Jed Mercurio’s adaptation of DH Lawrence’s classic.

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: Separated from his daughter, a father with an intellectual disability must prove his innocence when he is jailed for the death of a commander's child.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Arjun Reddy
recommendations.overview: A brilliant but impulsive young surgeon spirals into self-destruction after a painful breakup, struggling to cope with love, loss, and the consequences of his own temper.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Forever
recommendations.overview: A Hollywood-set romantic tale of a guy who is content to live his life without a job yet with the love of his life, a young actress.
